text: Standing at the threshold of this modern, angular space, I am aware of order and intention in its architecture. The glass acts as both a barrier and an invitation, reflecting my own uncertainties about the line between observation and participation. The prominent 'R+D' display beyond the glass stirs curiosity—innovation and discovery are foregrounded here. I feel a sense of quiet anticipation, poised between the sterile safety of the exterior and the vibrant, idea-rich world within.
